nasb.text: Now therefore, send quickly and tell David, saying, ‘Do not spend the night at the fords of the wilderness, but by all means cross over, or else the king and all the people who are with him will be destroyed.’ ”

esv.text: Now therefore send quickly and tell David, ‘Do not stay tonight at the fords of the wilderness, but by all means pass over, lest the king and all the people who are with him be swallowed up.’”

cnv.text: 現在你們要趕快派人去告訴大衛：‘今天晚上你不可在曠野的渡口住宿，務要過河，免得王和跟隨他的眾人都被吞滅。’”

ccb.text: 并说：“你们现在快派人去通知大卫，告诉他今晚不可在旷野的渡口过夜，务必要渡过约旦河，免得他和部下全军覆没。”
